entity_evidence.text: A machine-based system that may include software or physical hardware that performs tasks, based upon data set inputs, which requires human-like perception, cognition, planning, learning, communication, or physical action and which is capable of improving performance based upon learned experience without significant human oversight toward influencing real or virtual environments.
